productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Carozoon White Flip Flops
description: Designed with a sporty look, these adidas slide-on flip flops are absolutely comfortable and stylish. With quick drying properties, these slides make for great footwear even in wet conditions.UpperSoft footbed with circular suction point for ultimate comfortFoam strap with patented adidas 3-stripes for styleBranding embossed on the footbedOutsoleCircular lugs on the outsole with an upraised heel for absolute grip and traction even on wet surfacesFlip flop careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
